name: 6" Ceramic Planter Pot with Heart Sour Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
This Ceramic Planter Pot with Heart from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia is a beautiful addition to space. Made of ceramic in a sour cream hue with glazed finish, this round planter pot adds a timeless charm to your space. Plus, this rust-resistant planter boasts a faceted design and a cute heart motif on the rim for a sweet look. Featuring a single drainage hole to remove excess water, this pot is an ideal fit to house your favorite indoor plants for a stunning display.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
